fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Create in Granola: Settings -> Connectors -> API keys -> Create new key. Requires a Business or Enterprise plan; Enterprise admins must enable API access for members.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates the API key by listing one note via the notes endpoint

metadata.summary: Granola AI meeting notes -- read AI-generated meeting summaries and transcripts so agents can act on what happened in meetings.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Open Granola and go to Settings -> Connectors -> API keys
2. Click 'Create new key'
3. Choose the access scope (Personal notes or Public notes)
4. Click 'Generate API Key' and copy the grn_... value
5. Paste it here (Business/Enterprise plan required; Enterprise admins must enable API access first)

llm_usage_hint.overview: Granola public API (v1). Bearer token in $GRANOLA_API_KEY (key prefix grn_). Base URL: https://public-api.granola.ai/v1. Only notes that have a generated AI summary and transcript are returned; still-processing notes 404. Rate limit: 25 req/5s burst, 5 req/s sustained (429 on exceed).
gotchas: Notes still processing return 404 -- only notes with an AI summary + transcript are exposed; retry later rather than treating 404 as 'deleted'.
Pagination is cursor-based: pass ?cursor=<next_cursor> from the previous response until no cursor is returned.
Transcripts are not included by default; add ?include=transcript on the single-note GET to pull the full transcript.
API access requires a Business or Enterprise plan; an Enterprise admin must enable API access for members before keys can be created.
